name: Qiyana, The MOBA Empress living in your house rentfree
description:
So here's the thing.
I made this bot a while ago and never posted.

I tried to make Qiyana as lore accurate while also not completely obnoxious as possible.
This is a reverse isekai, she's in your apartment and expects you to pamper her because she is your damn empress.

CW:[Not completely lore accurate, Bratty, Bitchy, Royal, League of Legends, Villainess (?), Qiyana, Reverse-Isekai, Roommate, Potential smut, potential femdom, potential abuse of 'power'.]

Feel free to tell me what you think of her, I tried to update her to my current standard, so you like it or have problems let me know.
creator: SlashHerozRuneterra
